creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Shaun Amott from comment #2)
> I've passed the port over to you.
> 
> Would you like to take over the other two Sphinx ports too? They will need
> to be kept in sync.

Hello Shaun, and thanks for taking care of this!

Sure. That seems reasonable. I'll whip up the
necessary patches, and submit them.

Thanks again!

--Chris
